_comment_setup: Copy this file to .claude/settings.json in the generated business repo root.
PREREQUISITES
jq: must be on PATH (brew install jq / apt install jq). Without jq the
file_path extraction in PostToolUse Bash hooks silently exits 0 and no
validator fires. Verify with: which jq
SKILL_ROOT: must be set to the absolute path of the installed
b2c-mobile-business-launch skill directory (e.g.
~/.codex/skills/b2c-mobile-business-launch or the symlinked path on this
machine). Without SKILL_ROOT the hooks fall back to '.' which only works
when the business repo IS the skill root (local dev). In all other cases
the 'npm --prefix' calls will not resolve and hooks will fail silently.
Set via: export SKILL_ROOT=/path/to/skill  or add to .env.local.
BLOCKING vs ADVISORY
Hooks that affect lane-coverage and store-screenshots at 'done' are
BLOCKING (no '|| true') — a real failure surfaces as a hook error and the
agent turn is interrupted. All other validators are ADVISORY ('|| true') —
they print warnings but do not stop the agent.
PRODUCER != VERIFIER — SEPARATE GRADING PASS (screenshot rubric)
After final PNGs are written, the 'Final PNG hook' below emits a BLOCKING
signal that routes the grade step to a separate agent/session. The signal
exits non-zero so the agent sees the instruction as a hard requirement, not
just advisory text. The grader MUST be a different agent/session than the
builder. The grade-screenshots.ts scaffold emits the grading task template
and validates the assembled ledger before writing screenshot-rubric-scores.json.
store_console CANNOT be marked done until a validated separate-pass ledger exists.
Command: npx tsx scripts/grade-screenshots.ts --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml
HONEST LIMIT: The validator enforces distinct session_id values and
grading_pass.separate_pass=true, but cannot prove two truly independent
processes ran. Founder approval is the ultimate backstop.

PostToolUse._comment: Write/Edit hook: fires depth-check validators automatically after every relevant artifact write.

hooks.command: f=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$f" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$f" in *SCREENSHOTS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:store-screenshots -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 ;; *PROJECT_STATE.yaml*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:lane-coverage -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 ;; *ANALYTICS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:attribution -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *REVENUE_OPS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:revenue -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *EMAIL_OPS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:email -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *SPEC.md*|*APP_STORE_LISTING.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:aso-metadata -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *SECRETS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:secrets -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *TOOL_DECISIONS.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:paid-tool-decisions -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *LOCALIZATION_MARKET_RESEARCH.md*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:localization-research -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *screenshot-rubric-scores.json*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:store-screenshots -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *revenuecat-proof.json*|*posthog-proof.json*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:provider-proof -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; esac

PostToolUse._comment: Bash hook: catches proof artifacts written via touch/echo/tee/bash redirection — complements the Write|Edit hook above.

hooks.command: cmd=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$cmd" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$cmd" in *revenuecat-proof.json*|*posthog-proof.json*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:provider-proof -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *screenshot-rubric-scores.json*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:store-screenshots -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 || true ;; *PROJECT_STATE.yaml*) npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:lane-coverage -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml 2>&1 ;; esac

PostToolUse._comment: Final PNG hook (BLOCKING): after any final screenshot PNG is written, routes to the SEPARATE grading pass and exits non-zero so the agent sees it as a hard requirement. store_console CANNOT be marked done until a separate-pass ledger exists. PREREQUISITES: jq on PATH; SKILL_ROOT set to skill root so npx resolves. The hook prints the exact grade-screenshots.ts command to run.

hooks.command: f=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$f" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$f" in *screenshots/final/*.png) echo ''; echo '=========================================================='; echo 'BLOCKING: PRODUCER != VERIFIER — SEPARATE GRADING PASS REQUIRED'; echo '=========================================================='; echo 'A final screenshot PNG was just written. You MUST run the grading'; echo 'pass as a SEPARATE agent or session before marking store_console done.'; echo ''; echo 'The grader MUST NOT be the same agent/session that built the PNGs.'; echo 'The validator (check:store-screenshots) will ERROR if:'; echo '  - grading_pass.separate_pass is not true in screenshot-rubric-scores.json'; echo '  - builder.session_id equals grader.session_id'; echo '  - any slot is missing grader_notes or observed_evidence'; echo ''; echo 'STEP 1 — Generate the grading task template (run in THIS repo):'; echo '  npx tsx scripts/grade-screenshots.ts \'; echo '    --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml'; echo ''; echo 'STEP 2 — Open a NEW grader session (different agent/session_id).'; echo '  Provide the task template + final PNGs to the grader agent.'; echo '  The grader reads each PNG and fills in dimensions + observed_evidence.'; echo ''; echo 'STEP 3 — Validate and write the ledger:'; echo '  npx tsx scripts/grade-screenshots.ts \'; echo '    --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml \'; echo '    --grading-input /tmp/grading-output.json \'; echo '    --write screenshot-rubric-scores.json'; echo ''; echo 'STEP 4 — Verify the full rubric check passes:'; echo '  npm run --prefix "${SKILL_ROOT:-.}" check:store-screenshots -- --root . --state PROJECT_STATE.yaml'; echo ''; echo 'store_console CANNOT be marked done until all four steps complete.'; echo '=========================================================='; echo ''; exit 1 ;; esac
